_README: This file is managed by LazyCue (see shelley/lazycue). Do NOT edit by hand — it is the cached, machine-generated DSL for a self-healing browser test. To change behavior, edit the test description and re-run LazyCue.
description: Navigate to /new. Type "inline image" into the message input (data-testid "message-input") and click the send button (data-testid "send-button"). Wait (up to 60 seconds) for an element to appear inside an agent message (selector ".message-agent img"). That image's src attribute should match the pattern of starting with "/api/message/" and containing "/file?path=". The image should actually load: its naturalWidth (read via eval on the img element) should be greater than 0.

steps.expression: (() => { const src = document.querySelector('.message-agent img').getAttribute('src'); return src.startsWith('/api/message/') && src.includes('/file?path='); })()
(() => { const img = document.querySelector('.message-agent img'); return img.complete && img.naturalWidth > 0; })()
